headline: Citigroup Targets Higher Returns, Unveils $30 Billion Buyback at Investor Day
summary: Citigroup (NYSE:C) executives used the company’s 2026 Investor Day to outline a multi-year plan for higher returns, continued business investment and additional capital returns, with Chair and CEO Jane Fraser saying the bank has “rebuilt the engine” after several years of restructuring. Fraser said
